signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
**No definitive consensus exists on whether Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026; prediction markets currently price the probability at 34.8-37.6% "Yes," while analyst forecasts range widely from bearish lows of $0.0427-$0.1283 to bullish highs exceeding $0.20 or even $1.**[1][7][4]

Current DOGE price hovers around **$0.09-$0.14** based on recent analyses, requiring a **73-77% increase** over the remaining ~265 days to hit $0.16, a move achieved in only 15.9-17.6% of comparable
